title: Finnish Working Life Barometer 1997
description: The survey studied employee opinion on the quality of working life in Finland. Main themes were job characteristics, work environment, conflicts at the workplace, influence over decisions, working hours, wages, employment security and equality. The year 1997 survey contained new questions on discrimination. First, the respondents were asked about the number of years they had worked for the employer they were working for at the time, type of contract, number of persons at the workplace, what kind
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
